TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mato'asay sowal == O sowal no Sawaliay 'Amis a Finacadan to tilid/codad i, o ohong hananay. o citodotodongay iparo no kadopak, o citiliday ato sasing, o pitilidan to masamaamaanay a taneng, matiyaay o citing. Itini i pasawalian no Taywan a 'Amis a tamdaw i, o tilid hananay nangra ko ohong, mahecaday ko imi nona tosa a tilid. O tanengnengan no tamdamdaw a ohong, o pitongalan to taneng no tamdaw. O ohong hananay i, adihay ko kasaromaroma no tilid. Ira ko kongkoan a ohong, ira ko tanengnengan no ka'emangay a ohong, Cilamlamay to masamaamaanay tilid a Cace . Saheto sa o kaolahan no tamdamdaw a ohong. O pipahacean to ohong i, o pa'acaay to ohong a patiyamay hananay. O 'ariri no ohong i, opicaliwan to ohong. 2010 a mihecaan mikisang ko Kuko a kosi i, mi insaco kingkiw tangasa tahanini. Mapasadak to cecay ira ko tolo a patek ko 'ofad cakalalecalecad ko ngangan no ohong. Ono aniniay a ohong a imi. Citondongan to Pasifana', Kesyie ato Punka a Saopo no Linheko pakayni tona ohong a imi: Ona pasadakay to ohong a kosi, tonanipasadakan a ohong i sepat ira ko siwa a felih komi insacoan (rina') nangra. Ira koni mipatodecekan a ngangan no ohong ato ngangan no tawdaw. Tonani pasadakan a ohong ira ko o Lalekoan Fanko no Ohong i kalokitakit , ira ho haca, ato Pa'ading to Tinki no Ohong , mapasadak konian manga'ay a malatadaohong. O sowal no 'Amis Iraay ko sowal nika awaay ko tilid no 'Amis a Finacdan. O sapi punka to taneng no finacadan, kitiniay i kasa'opo'opo no orip' no tamdamdaw a fana' to orip' no 'Amis ato to rayray no kimad no mato'say. Tahanini i, polongen no mita ko taneng no mato'asay, no ca'enotay a sowal ato punka i polongen a mifana' a mikilok, nga mangay a matatongotongod ko sowal no mato'asay. Sa ira ko citanengay a tamdaw tiliden ningra, pahadaken ira i ohong ko sowal no mato'asay. Samaanen a mi'osaw a patatorotorod ko taneng no to'as ato punka no finacadan, itiya ho o fana' sanay no tangal ko mi'osaway a patatongotongod to taneng ato punka no to'as, anini sa i, ira ko pakimad, Pakitohpakonko, pasowal, radiwen, sakero ato 'orip hananay, adihay ko masamaamaanay a pakayraan.
S.PHON: == mato~uʡasaj so~uwaɾ == o~u so~uwaɾ no~u sawaɾiaj ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ/ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i, o~u o~uħo~uŋ ħananaj. o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uto~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj iparo~u no~u kaɬ~ɮo~upak, o~u ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u sasiŋ, o~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u masamaamaanaj a tanəŋ, matijaaj o~u ʦitiŋ. itini i pasawaɾian no~u tajwan a ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ħananaj naŋra ko~u o~uħo~uŋ, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u imi no~una to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u tanəŋnəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a o~uħo~uŋ, o~u pito~uŋaɾan to~u tanəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u o~uħo~uŋ ħananaj i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ira ko~u ko~uŋko~uan a o~uħo~uŋ, ira ko~u tanəŋnəŋan no~u kaʡəmaŋaj a o~uħo~uŋ, ʦiɾamɾamaj to~u masamaamaanaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ a ʦaʦə . saħəto~u sa o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a o~uħo~uŋ. o~u pipaħaʦəan to~u o~uħo~uŋ i, o~u paʡaʦaaj to~u o~uħo~uŋ a patijamaj ħananaj. o~u ʡariri no~u o~uħo~uŋ i, o~upiʦaɾiwan to~u o~uħo~uŋ. **** a miħəʦaan mikisaŋ ko~u ko~u~uko~u a ko~usi i, mi insaʦo~u kiŋkiw taŋasa taħanini. mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ʦəʦaj ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a patək ko~u ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ʦakaɾaɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u o~uħo~uŋ. o~uno~u aniniaj a o~uħo~uŋ a imi. ʦito~unɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u pasifanaʡ, kəsjiə ato~u po~u~unka a sao~upo~u no~u ɾinħəko~u pakajni to~una o~uħo~uŋ a imi: o~una pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u o~uħo~uŋ a ko~usi, to~unanipasaɬ~ɮakan a o~uħo~uŋ i səpat ira ko~u siwa a fəɾiħ ko~umi insaʦo~uan (rinaʡ) naŋra. ira ko~uni mipato~uɬ~ɮəʦəkan a ŋaŋan no~u o~uħo~uŋ ato~u ŋaŋan no~u tawɬ~ɮaw. to~unani pasaɬ~ɮakan a o~uħo~uŋ ira ko~u o~u ɾaɾəko~uan fanko~u no~u o~uħo~uŋ i kaɾo~ukitakit , ira ħo~u ħaʦa, ato~u paʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u tinki no~u o~uħo~uŋ , mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~unian maŋaʡaj a maɾataɬ~ɮao~uħo~uŋ. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis iraaj ko~u so~uwaɾ nika awaaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a finaʦɬ~ɮan. o~u sapi po~u~unka to~u tanəŋ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kitiniaj i kasaʡo~upo~uʡo~upo~u no~u o~uripʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a fanaʡ to~u o~uripʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u to~u rajraj no~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u mato~uʡsaj. taħanini i, po~uɾo~uŋən no~u mita ko~u tanəŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj, no~u ʦaʡəno~utaj a so~uwaɾ ato~u po~u~unka i po~uɾo~uŋən a mifanaʡ a mikiɾo~uk, ŋa maŋaj a matato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. sa ira ko~u ʦitanəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw tiɾiɬ~ɮən niŋra, paħaɬ~ɮakən ira i o~uħo~uŋ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. samaanən a miʡo~usaw a patato~uro~uto~uro~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tanəŋ no~u to~uʡas ato~u po~u~unka no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, itija ħo~u o~u fanaʡ sanaj no~u taŋaɾ ko~u miʡo~usawaj a patato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tanəŋ ato~u po~u~unka no~u to~uʡas, anini sa i, ira ko~u pakimaɬ~ɮ, pakito~uħpako~unko~u, paso~uwaɾ, raɬ~ɮiwən, sakəro~u ato~u ʡo~urip ħananaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamaamaanaj a pakajraan.
S.FORM: == mato'asay sowal == O sowal no Sawaliay 'Amis a Finacadan to tilid/codad i, o ohong hananay. o citodotodongay iparo no kadopak, o citiliday ato sasing, o pitilidan to masamaamaanay a taneng, matiyaay o citing. Itini i pasawalian no Taywan a 'Amis a tamdaw i, o tilid hananay nangra ko ohong, mahecaday ko imi nona tosa a tilid. O tanengnengan no tamdamdaw a ohong, o pitongalan to taneng no tamdaw. O ohong hananay i, adihay ko kasaromaroma no tilid. Ira ko kongkoan a ohong, ira ko tanengnengan no ka'emangay a ohong, Cilamlamay to masamaamaanay tilid a Cace . Saheto sa o kaolahan no tamdamdaw a ohong. O pipahacean to ohong i, o pa'acaay to ohong a patiyamay hananay. O 'ariri no ohong i, opicaliwan to ohong. 2010 a mihecaan mikisang ko Kuko a kosi i, mi insaco kingkiw tangasa tahanini. Mapasadak to cecay ira ko tolo a patek ko 'ofad cakalalecalecad ko ngangan no ohong. Ono aniniay a ohong a imi. Citondongan to Pasifana', Kesyie ato Punka a Saopo no Linheko pakayni tona ohong a imi: Ona pasadakay to ohong a kosi, tonanipasadakan a ohong i sepat ira ko siwa a felih komi insacoan (rina') nangra. Ira koni mipatodecekan a ngangan no ohong ato ngangan no tawdaw. Tonani pasadakan a ohong ira ko o Lalekoan Fanko no Ohong i kalokitakit , ira ho haca, ato Pa'ading to Tinki no Ohong , mapasadak konian manga'ay a malatadaohong. O sowal no 'Amis Iraay ko sowal nika awaay ko tilid no 'Amis a Finacdan. O sapi punka to taneng no finacadan, kitiniay i kasa'opo'opo no orip' no tamdamdaw a fana' to orip' no 'Amis ato to rayray no kimad no mato'say. Tahanini i, polongen no mita ko taneng no mato'asay, no ca'enotay a sowal ato punka i polongen a mifana' a mikilok, nga mangay a matatongotongod ko sowal no mato'asay. Sa ira ko citanengay a tamdaw tiliden ningra, pahadaken ira i ohong ko sowal no mato'asay. Samaanen a mi'osaw a patatorotorod ko taneng no to'as ato punka no finacadan, itiya ho o fana' sanay no tangal ko mi'osaway a patatongotongod to taneng ato punka no to'as, anini sa i, ira ko pakimad, Pakitohpakonko, pasowal, radiwen, sakero ato 'orip hananay, adihay ko masamaamaanay a pakayraan.
S.PHON: == mato~uʡasaj so~uwaɾ == o~u so~uwaɾ no~u sawaɾiaj ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ/ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i, o~u o~uħo~uŋ ħananaj. o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uto~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj iparo~u no~u kaɬ~ɮo~upak, o~u ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u sasiŋ, o~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u masamaamaanaj a tanəŋ, matijaaj o~u ʦitiŋ. itini i pasawaɾian no~u tajwan a ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ħananaj naŋra ko~u o~uħo~uŋ, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u imi no~una to~usa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u tanəŋnəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a o~uħo~uŋ, o~u pito~uŋaɾan to~u tanəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u o~uħo~uŋ ħananaj i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ira ko~u ko~uŋko~uan a o~uħo~uŋ, ira ko~u tanəŋnəŋan no~u kaʡəmaŋaj a o~uħo~uŋ, ʦiɾamɾamaj to~u masamaamaanaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ a ʦaʦə . saħəto~u sa o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a o~uħo~uŋ. o~u pipaħaʦəan to~u o~uħo~uŋ i, o~u paʡaʦaaj to~u o~uħo~uŋ a patijamaj ħananaj. o~u ʡariri no~u o~uħo~uŋ i, o~upiʦaɾiwan to~u o~uħo~uŋ. **** a miħəʦaan mikisaŋ ko~u ko~u~uko~u a ko~usi i, mi insaʦo~u kiŋkiw taŋasa taħanini. mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ʦəʦaj ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a patək ko~u ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ʦakaɾaɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u o~uħo~uŋ. o~uno~u aniniaj a o~uħo~uŋ a imi. ʦito~unɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u pasifanaʡ, kəsjiə ato~u po~u~unka a sao~upo~u no~u ɾinħəko~u pakajni to~una o~uħo~uŋ a imi: o~una pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u o~uħo~uŋ a ko~usi, to~unanipasaɬ~ɮakan a o~uħo~uŋ i səpat ira ko~u siwa a fəɾiħ ko~umi insaʦo~uan (rinaʡ) naŋra. ira ko~uni mipato~uɬ~ɮəʦəkan a ŋaŋan no~u o~uħo~uŋ ato~u ŋaŋan no~u tawɬ~ɮaw. to~unani pasaɬ~ɮakan a o~uħo~uŋ ira ko~u o~u ɾaɾəko~uan fanko~u no~u o~uħo~uŋ i kaɾo~ukitakit , ira ħo~u ħaʦa, ato~u paʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u tinki no~u o~uħo~uŋ , mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~unian maŋaʡaj a maɾataɬ~ɮao~uħo~uŋ. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis iraaj ko~u so~uwaɾ nika awaaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a finaʦɬ~ɮan. o~u sapi po~u~unka to~u tanəŋ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, kitiniaj i kasaʡo~upo~uʡo~upo~u no~u o~uripʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw a fanaʡ to~u o~uripʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u to~u rajraj no~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u mato~uʡsaj. taħanini i, po~uɾo~uŋən no~u mita ko~u tanəŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj, no~u ʦaʡəno~utaj a so~uwaɾ ato~u po~u~unka i po~uɾo~uŋən a mifanaʡ a mikiɾo~uk, ŋa maŋaj a matato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. sa ira ko~u ʦitanəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw tiɾiɬ~ɮən niŋra, paħaɬ~ɮakən ira i o~uħo~uŋ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. samaanən a miʡo~usaw a patato~uro~uto~uro~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tanəŋ no~u to~uʡas ato~u po~u~unka no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, itija ħo~u o~u fanaʡ sanaj no~u taŋaɾ ko~u miʡo~usawaj a patato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tanəŋ ato~u po~u~unka no~u to~uʡas, anini sa i, ira ko~u pakimaɬ~ɮ, pakito~uħpako~unko~u, paso~uwaɾ, raɬ~ɮiwən, sakəro~u ato~u ʡo~urip ħananaj, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u masamaamaanaj a pakajraan.
